channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: U.S. Steps Up Response to Screwworm Outbreak Threatening Livestock
item.description:
Federal agencies are expanding emergency measures to combat the spread of New World screwworm cases in the U.S., aiming to protect livestock and prevent wider agricultural impacts.

Key points:
• USDA has confirmed multiple new cases of the parasitic New World screwworm in cattle, goats, and a dog in Texas and New Mexico, the first domestic detections in decades.
• Federal response includes increased surveillance, quarantines, animal movement restrictions, and releases of sterile flies to control the outbreak.
• The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has issued emergency drug authorizations for treatment options to help contain infestations in livestock and pets.
• State and federal officials are urging livestock owners and veterinarians to monitor animals closely, report suspected cases, and implement biosecurity practices to prevent further spread.

Read the full article: U.S. Steps Up Response to Screwworm Outbreak Threatening Livestock

item.title: The "Croqueta Fee" Allegations: Did Personal Retaliation Taint an OCIF Enforcement Case?
item.description:
Inside the OCIF "Croqueta Fee" allegations involving Natalia Zequeira, Allied Fleet Services, AAA Car Rental, and Puerto Rico's financial regulator.

Read the full article: The "Croqueta Fee" Allegations: Did Personal Retaliation Taint an OCIF Enforcement Case?

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
